title: A new partial differential nonlinear system containing quasivariational and parabolic variational inequalities and its application
summary: We study a new nonlinear system which contains a partial differential equation, a quasivariational inequality and a parabolic variational inequality in Banach spaces. We obtain the unique solvability of the coupled system under moderate conditions by using the Banach's fixed point theorem. We employ the main results to investigate a viscoelastic frictional contact problem with long-memory effects, wear processes, and damage phenomenon.

AI.tldr: 建立了包含PDE、拟变分不等式和抛物变分不等式的耦合系统的唯一可解性理论，并应用于粘弹性摩擦接触问题
AI.motivation: 研究Banach空间中包含偏微分方程、拟变分不等式和抛物变分不等式的复杂耦合系统，旨在建立一般理论框架并应用于具有长期记忆效应、磨损过程和损伤现象的粘弹性摩擦接触问题
AI.techniques: 使用Banach不动点定理，在适度条件下证明耦合系统的唯一可解性；将抽象理论应用于具体的粘弹性摩擦接触问题
AI.main_theorems: 在Banach空间中建立了包含PDE、拟变分不等式和抛物变分不等式的耦合系统的唯一可解性结果；将该抽象结果应用于具有长期记忆、磨损和损伤的粘弹性摩擦接触问题
AI.significance: 为复杂耦合系统提供了统一的数学框架，扩展了变分不等式理论在接触力学中的应用，特别对具有记忆效应、磨损和损伤的粘弹性材料接触问题有重要理论意义

title: Dimension reduction for gradient damage models in slender rods
summary: This paper presents a method for reducing a three-dimensional gradient damage model to a one-dimensional model for slender rods (with a small radius-to-length ratio, $δ= R/L \to 0$). The 3D model minimizes an energy functional that includes elastic strain energy, a damage-dependent degradation function $a_η(α)$, a damage energy term $w(α)$, and a gradient term penalizing abrupt damage variations. After non-dimensionalizing and rescaling, the problem is reformulated on a unit cylinder, and the behaviour of the energy functional is analyzed as $δ$ approaches zero. Using $Γ$-convergence, we show that the sequence of 3D energy functionals converges to a 1D functional, defined over displacement and damage fields that are independent of transverse coordinates. Compactness results guarantee the weak convergence of strains and damage gradients, while lower and upper bound inequalities confirm the energy limit. Minimizers of the 3D energy are proven to converge to the minimizers of the 1D energy, with strains approaching a diagonal form indicative of uniaxial deformation.

AI.tldr: 提出了将三维梯度损伤模型约化为细长杆一维模型的方法，通过Γ收敛证明了能量泛函的极限行为。
AI.motivation: 研究细长杆结构（半径长度比δ=R/L→0）的三维梯度损伤模型，旨在通过维度约化获得更易处理的一维模型，同时保持物理本质。
AI.techniques: 使用Γ收敛理论、能量泛函分析、非维化和重标度、紧致性论证、上下界不等式、变分渐近分析。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了三维能量泛函序列Γ收敛到一维泛函；获得了应变和损伤梯度的弱收敛性；证明了三维最小化子收敛到一维最小化子；应变趋于对角线形式表明单轴变形。
AI.significance: 为细长结构的损伤分析提供了严格的数学基础，建立了三维模型与简化一维模型之间的桥梁，对结构力学和材料损伤建模有重要理论价值。

title: Irregular Diffusions and Loss of Regularity in Polyconvex Gradient Flows
summary: We investigate diffusion-type partial differential equations that are irregular in the sense that they admit weak solutions which are nowhere smooth, even for prescribed smooth data. By reformulating these equations as first-order partial differential relations and adapting the method of convex integration, we develop a construction scheme based on new geometric structures, referred to as $\mathcal{T}_N$-configurations, together with a simplified structural hypothesis on the diffusion functions, termed Condition $O_N$. Under this condition, we show that the associated initial and boundary value problems with certain smooth initial-boundary data admit infinitely many Lipschitz weak solutions that are nowhere $C^1$. We further analyze specific $\mathcal{T}_N$-configurations and establish nondegeneracy conditions that are essential for verifying Condition $O_N$. As an application, we construct examples of strongly polyconvex energy functionals whose gradient flows generate irregular diffusion equations, thereby revealing a failure of regularity and uniqueness even within the class of polyconvex gradient flows.

AI.tldr: 该论文发展了凸积分方法，构造了扩散型PDE的无穷多无处光滑Lipschitz弱解，揭示了多凸梯度流中正则性和唯一性的失效。
AI.motivation: 研究具有不规则性的扩散型偏微分方程，这些方程即使对于光滑数据也允许弱解无处光滑，旨在理解多凸梯度流中正则性和唯一性的失效机制。
AI.techniques: 将扩散方程重构为一阶偏微分关系，采用凸积分方法，引入新的几何结构$\mathcal{T}_N$-配置，以及简化的结构假设条件$O_N$。
AI.main_theorems: 在条件$O_N$下，证明具有特定光滑初边值问题的扩散方程存在无穷多Lipschitz弱解且这些解无处$C^1$；构造强多凸能量泛函的梯度流产生不规则扩散方程的具体例子。
AI.significance: 揭示了多凸梯度流中正则性和唯一性的失效，为理解非线性扩散方程的病态行为提供了新视角，发展了处理不规则PDE的凸积分技术。

title: Normalized Solutions for Schrödinger-Bopp-Podolsky Systems with Critical Choquard-Type Nonlinearity on Bounded Domains
summary: In this paper, we study normalized solutions for the following critical Schrödinger-Bopp-Podolsky system: $$-Δu + q(x)φu = λu + |u|^{p-2}u + \bigl(I_α* |u|^{3+α}\bigr)|u|^{1+α}u,\quad \text{in } Ω_r,$$ $$-Δφ+ Δ^2φ= q(x)u^2, \ \qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\qquad\ \text{ in } Ω_r,$$ where $Ω_r \subset \mathbb R^3$ is a smooth bounded domain, $p \in \left(2, \frac{8}{3}\right)$, $q(x) \in C(\barΩ_r) \backslash \{0\}$ and $λ\in \mathbb R$ is the Lagrange multiplier associated with the constraint $\int_{Ω_r} |u|^2\, \mathrm d x = b^2$ for some $b > 0$. Here $α> 0$, $I_α$ denotes the Riesz potential, and the domain parameter $r$ reflects the size of $Ω_r$ whose precise definition will be given in Section 3. By applying a special minimax principle together with a truncation technique, we prove that there exists $b^* > 0$ such that the system admits multiple normalized solutions whenever $b \in (0, b^*)$ under Navier boundary conditions.

AI.tldr: 证明了临界Schrödinger-Bopp-Podolsky系统在特定质量约束下存在多个归一化解
AI.motivation: 研究带质量约束的临界Schrödinger-Bopp-Podolsky系统，该系统结合了非线性薛定谔方程和Bopp-Podolsky电磁理论，在量子物理和电磁场理论中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 使用特殊的极小极大原理结合截断技术，处理临界指数和非局部项带来的紧性困难
AI.main_theorems: 存在b*>0使得当b∈(0,b*)时，系统在Navier边界条件下存在多个归一化解
AI.significance: 为临界非线性薛定谔-Bopp-Podolsky系统提供了归一化解的存在性理论，扩展了相关物理模型的研究框架

title: Asymptotic stability of steady states for the compressible Navier-Stokes-Riesz system in the presence of vacuum
summary: We consider a one-dimensional physical vacuum free boundary problem on the compressible Navier-Stokes-Riesz system for an attractive Riesz potential $|x|^{2s-1}/(2s-1)$ with $0<s<1/2$. It is proved that for the adiabatic constant $γ$ satisfying $2(1-s)<γ<1+2s/3$ under the additional condition that $3/8<s<1/2$, there exists a unique global-in-time strong solution. Specifically, we establish the Lyapunov-type stability of the compactly supported steady states in the Lagrangian coordinates and we also obtain the time rate of convergence for the strong solution to steady states with the same mass in weighted Sobolev spaces where the weights indicate the behavior of solutions near the vacuum free boundary. The difficulties and challenges in the proof are caused not only by the degeneracy due to the vacuum free boundary but also by the non-local feature of the Riesz potential.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有吸引性Riesz势的压缩Navier-Stokes-Riesz系统在一维物理真空自由边界问题中的全局强解存在唯一性及稳态解的稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究具有吸引性Riesz势的压缩Navier-Stokes系统在真空自由边界条件下的动力学行为，这类问题结合了流体力学与非局部势的相互作用，在数学物理中有重要意义
AI.techniques: 采用Lagrangian坐标变换处理自由边界，使用加权Sobolev空间刻画真空边界附近行为，建立Lyapunov型稳定性分析，处理非局部Riesz势带来的技术困难
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在绝热常数γ满足2(1-s)<γ<1+2s/3且3/8<s<1/2条件下，存在唯一的全局强解；建立了紧支撑稳态解的Lyapunov型稳定性，并得到了强解向同质量稳态解在加权Sobolev空间中的收敛速率
AI.significance: 首次处理了具有非局部吸引势的Navier-Stokes系统在真空自由边界条件下的全局适定性问题，为理解非局部相互作用下的流体动力学提供了理论框架

title: On the stability of degenerate Schrödinger equation under boundary fractional damping
summary: In this paper we study the well-posedness and stability of degenerate Schrödinger equation with a fractional boundary damping. First, we establish the well-posedness of the degenerate problem $ψ_t(x,t)-\imath(τ(x) ψ_x(x,t))_x=0, \hbox{ with } x \in (0,1)$, controlled by Dirichlet-Neumann conditions. Then, exponential and polynomial decay rate of the solution are established using multiplier method.

AI.tldr: 研究具有分数阶边界阻尼的退化薛定谔方程的适定性和稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究退化薛定谔方程（系数τ(x)可能退化为零）在分数阶边界阻尼控制下的适定性和稳定性问题，这类方程在量子力学和波传播中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 使用乘子方法（multiplier method）建立能量衰减估计，处理退化系数和分数阶边界阻尼带来的技术挑战
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立Dirichlet-Neumann边界控制下退化薛定谔方程的适定性；2. 证明解具有指数衰减率；3. 证明解具有多项式衰减率
AI.significance: 扩展了退化薛定谔方程的理论框架，为具有边界阻尼的退化波动方程稳定性分析提供了新方法，在量子控制和波传播控制中有潜在应用

title: Positive weak solutions of a double-phase variable exponent problem with a fractional-Hardy-type singular potential and superlinear nonlinearity
summary: In the present paper, we study a double-phase variable exponent problem which is set up within a variational framework including a singular potential of fractional-Hardy-type. We employ the Mountain-Pass theorem and the strong minimum principle to obtain the existence of at least one nontrivial positive weak solution.

AI.tldr: 研究具有分数阶Hardy型奇异势的双相变指数问题的正弱解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究一类包含奇异势的双相变指数问题，这类问题在数学物理和非线性分析中有重要应用，特别是涉及分数阶Hardy势的情形
AI.techniques: 变分方法、山路定理、强最小值原理
AI.main_theorems: 证明了至少存在一个非平凡正弱解的存在性定理
AI.significance: 扩展了双相变指数问题的理论，为包含奇异势的非线性偏微分方程提供了新的存在性结果，在非标准增长问题和分数阶分析中有重要应用

title: The unique limit of the Glimm-Lax construction for Sobolev data and obstructions to 1-d convex integration
summary: We consider a genuinely nonlinear $1$-d system of hyperbolic conservation laws with two unknowns. A famous construction of Glimm & Lax shows that global-in-time "Glimm-Lax" weak entropy solutions exist in this setting for any initial data with small $L^\infty$ norm [Mem. Amer. Math. Soc. (1970), no. 101]. Recent work in the $L^1$-stability theory by Bressan, Marconi & Vaidya has given the first partial uniqueness and stability results for these solutions [Arch. Ration. Mech. Anal. (2025), vol. 249]. In this paper, we build on these results by combining them with recent advances in the $L^2$-theory. We show that solutions with initial data in the Sobolev space $H^s$ for $s>0$ are unique in the full class of Glimm--Lax solutions that decay in total variation at a rate of $1/t$. As a secondary result, our techniques are also used to show the recent non-uniqueness result of Chen, Vasseur & Yu for continuous solutions (arxiv:2407.02927) cannot extend to $C^α$ solutions for $α> 1/2$, alongside some appropriate fractional Sobolev spaces $W^{s,p}$. An auxiliary result of independent interest is the development of a weighted relative entropy contraction for perturbations of rarefaction waves.

AI.tldr: 证明了Glimm-Lax弱熵解在Sobolev空间H^s(s>0)初值下的唯一性，并限制了非唯一性结果的范围。
AI.motivation: 研究一维双曲守恒律系统Glimm-Lax弱熵解的唯一性问题，结合L^1稳定性和L^2理论的最新进展，解决解的唯一性条件。
AI.techniques: 结合L^1稳定性理论（Bressan-Marconi-Vaidya）和L^2理论，发展加权相对熵收缩方法，分析扰动稀疏波的性质。
AI.main_theorems: 1. H^s(s>0)初值的Glimm-Lax解在总变差以1/t衰减的解类中唯一；2. Chen-Vasseur-Yu的非唯一性结果不能扩展到C^α(α>1/2)解；3. 建立了稀疏波扰动的加权相对熵收缩性质。
AI.significance: 首次给出了Glimm-Lax解在Sobolev空间初值下的唯一性条件，深化了对双曲守恒律解唯一性的理解，限制了非唯一性现象的范围。

title: On the well-posedness of two-dimensional Muskat problem with an elastic interface
summary: We investigate the two-dimensional Muskat problem with a nonlinear elastic interface, for both one-phase and two-phase scenarios. Following the framework developed by Nguyen [35,36], we demonstrate that the problem is locally well-posed in $H^s$ for $s\geq 2$ for arbitrary initial data. Furthermore, for the one-phase case and the stable two-phase case $(ρ^+ \leq ρ^-)$, we establish global well-posedness for small initial data in $H^s$ when $s> \frac{3}{2}$.

AI.tldr: 建立了带非线性弹性界面的二维Muskat问题在H^s空间中的局部适定性，并在小初值条件下证明了单相和稳定两相情形的全局适定性。
AI.motivation: 研究具有弹性界面的Muskat问题，这是多孔介质中两种不混溶流体界面运动的经典问题。弹性界面的引入增加了问题的非线性复杂性，需要分析界面弹性对流体运动的影响。
AI.techniques: 基于Nguyen [35,36]的框架，使用能量估计方法，在H^s空间（s≥2）中建立局部适定性，通过小初值条件证明全局适定性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对任意初值，在H^s空间（s≥2）中证明局部适定性；2. 对单相情形和稳定两相情形（ρ^+ ≤ ρ^-），在小初值条件下证明H^s空间（s>3/2）中的全局适定性。
AI.significance: 将经典Muskat问题推广到包含弹性界面的情形，为理解多孔介质中弹性界面对流体界面稳定性的影响提供了理论基础，对石油工程、地下水流动等应用领域有重要意义。

title: Construction of Solutions with Extraordinary Gradient Amplification and Localization for Schrödinger Equations
summary:
This paper constructs solutions to linear and nonlinear Schrödinger-type equations in two and three spatial dimensions that exhibit prescribed, extraordinary gradient amplification and localization. For any finite time interval $[0,T]$, any prescribed collection of $n\in\mathbb{N}$ distinct points on $\partial D$, where $D$ is the compact support of the anisotropic coefficients, lower-order terms, or nonlinearities, and any amplitude threshold $\mathcal{M}>0$, we show that one can design smooth initial and/or boundary data such that the spatial gradients of the resulting solutions exceed $\mathcal{M}$ in neighborhoods of these points outside $D$ for almost every $t\in[0,T]$. Moreover, the ratio between the local $C^{1,\frac12}$-norm of the solution near each prescribed point outside $D$ and the $C^{1,\frac12}$-norm inside $D$ is bounded from below by $\mathcal{M}/2$ for almost every $t\in[0,T]$.
  We further prove that the spatial measure of the regions where the gradient magnitude exceeds $\mathcal{M}$ tends to zero as $\mathcal{M}\to\infty$, demonstrating that the amplification phenomenon is highly localized. This effect arises from the structure of the
  Schrödinger-type equation combined with carefully designed input profiles. From a physical perspective, the results provide a deterministic analogue of localization phenomena observed in quantum scattering and Anderson localization. In addition, the observed trade-off between extreme spatial localization and large gradient amplification is fully consistent with the spirit of the Heisenberg uncertainty principle: while the latter is traditionally formulated in a global $L^2$ space--frequency framework, our results offer a complementary deterministic manifestation at the level of localized spatial gradients in Schrödinger dynamics.

AI.tldr: 构造薛定谔型方程的解，实现任意预设点处的梯度放大和高度局部化现象
AI.motivation: 研究薛定谔型方程中梯度放大和局部化现象，为量子散射和安德森局域化提供确定性类比，探索海森堡不确定性原理在空间梯度层面的表现
AI.techniques: 精心设计初始和边界数据，利用各向异性系数、低阶项或非线性项的紧支集结构，构造具有特定放大特性的解
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意有限时间区间、任意预设点集和任意振幅阈值，可设计光滑数据使解的空间梯度在预设点邻域超过阈值；梯度放大区域测度随阈值增大趋于零，证明高度局部化
AI.significance: 为量子力学中的局域化现象提供确定性数学框架，揭示海森堡不确定性原理在空间梯度层面的新表现形式，在波传播和量子控制中有潜在应用

title: Fragmentation-coagulation processes with advection or diffusion in space
summary: In this paper, we consider a continuous fragmentation--coagulation model in which the reacting particles can be transported in physical space through either advection or diffusion. We prove new results on the generation of $C_0$-semigroups with parameter and use them to show that the Abstract Cauchy Problem associated with a more general version of the advection/diffusion--fragmentation problem generates a positive $C_0$-semigroup in spaces $L_1(\mathbb R_+, X_x, (1+m^r)dm),$ where $m$ is the particle mass, $X_x$ is either the space of integrable or continuous functions with respect to the spatial variable, and the weight exponent $r$ is sufficiently large. These results enable us to prove the classical solvability of a wide range of advection/diffusion--fragmentation--coagulation equations with unbounded coagulation kernels.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有对流/扩散的连续破碎-凝聚模型在加权L1空间中生成正C0半群，从而解决了无界凝聚核的适定性问题
AI.motivation: 研究同时包含破碎、凝聚过程以及物理空间中对流/扩散输运的粒子系统，这类模型在气溶胶动力学、大气科学和工业过程中有重要应用，但无界凝聚核的存在使得数学分析变得困难
AI.techniques: 发展了带参数的C0半群生成理论，利用加权L1空间技术，结合算子半群理论和正性保持方法，处理无界算子的生成问题
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在加权空间L1(R+, X_x, (1+m^r)dm)中，对流/扩散-破碎-凝聚方程的抽象柯西问题生成正C0半群，其中r足够大，X_x可以是关于空间变量的可积函数空间或连续函数空间
AI.significance: 为具有无界凝聚核的对流/扩散-破碎-凝聚方程提供了严格的数学基础，扩展了经典适定性理论，为实际应用中更复杂的粒子系统建模提供了理论支持

title: Interpolative Refinement of Gap Bound Conditions for Singular Parabolic Double Phase Problems
summary: We consider inhomogeneous singular parabolic double phase equations of type $$ u_t-\operatorname{div}(|Du|^{p-2}Du + a(x,t)|Du|^{q-2}Du)=-\operatorname{div} (|F|^{p-2}F + a(x,t)|F|^{q-2}F) $$ in $Ω_T := Ω\times (0,T)\subset \mathbb{R}^n\times \mathbb{R}$, where $\frac{2n}{n+2}<p\leq 2$, $p<q$ and $0\leq a(\cdot)\in C^{α,\fracα{2}}(Ω_T)$. We establish gradient higher integrability results for weak solutions to the above problems under one of the following two assumptions: $$ u\in L^\infty (Ω_T) \quad\text{and}\quad q\leq p +\frac{α(p(n+2)-2n)}{4}, $$ or $$ u\in C(0,T;L^s(Ω)),\quad s\geq 2 \quad\text{and}\quad q\leq p+\frac{αμ_s}{n+s}, $$ where $μ_s := \frac{(p(n+2)-2n)s}{4}$. These results yield an interpolation refinement of gap bounds in the singular parabolic double phase setting.

AI.tldr: 建立了奇异抛物双相方程弱解的梯度高可积性结果，改进了奇异性条件下的间隙界限。
AI.motivation: 研究具有奇异性的抛物双相方程，这类方程在非均匀介质中自然出现，其系数$a(x,t)$的空间时间正则性对解的性质有重要影响，需要建立梯度高可积性以理解解的正则性。
AI.techniques: 使用抛物正则化方法、De Giorgi-Nash-Moser型估计、能量估计和插值技术，结合系数$a(x,t)$的Hölder连续性假设。
AI.main_theorems: 在两种假设下建立梯度高可积性：1) 解有界且$q$满足间隙条件；2) 解具有时间连续性和$L^s$空间可积性且$q$满足相应间隙条件，这些结果改进了奇异抛物双相设置中的间隙界限。
AI.significance: 为奇异抛物双相方程的正则性理论提供了重要进展，建立了梯度高可积性结果，改进了现有间隙界限，对理解非均匀介质中抛物方程的解行为有重要意义。

title: Free boundary problem for two-dimensional ElectroHydroDynamic Equations with a gravity field
summary:
This paper studies a two-phase free boundary problem governed by the ElectroHydroDynamic equations, which describes a perfectly conducting, incompressible, irrotational fluid with gravity, surrounded by a dielectric gas. The interface separating fluid and gas is referred to as the free boundary. 
It is known that the free surface remains smooth away from the stagnation points, where the relative velocity of the incompressible fluid vanishes. In the presence of gravity, the Stokes conjecture, proved by Varvaruca and Weiss [Acta. Math. 206, 363-403, (2011)], implies that the corner type singularity will occur in the one-phase incompressible fluid. It is natural to ask whether this conjecture still holds in the two-phase flow problem. As a consequence, the primary objective of this work is to characterize the possible singular profiles of the free interface near the stagnation points in the presence of an electric field. 
Our main result is the discovery of a critical decay rate of the electric field near the stagnation points which indicates the classification of the singular profiles of the free surface. More precisely, we showed that when the decay rate of the electric field is faster than the critical decay rate, its negligible effect implies that the singular profile must be the well-known Stokes corner. When the electric field decays as the critical decay rate, the symmetry of the corner region may be broken, giving rise to either a Stokes corner or an asymmetric corner as the possible singular profile. If the decay rate is slower than the critical decay rate, the electric field dominates and completely destroys the corner structure, resulting in a cusp singularity. The analysis of these singularities relies on variational principles and geometric methods. Key technical tools include a Weiss-type monotonicity formula, a frequency formula, and a concentration-compactness argument.

AI.tldr: 建立了电流体动力学两相自由边界问题在驻点附近奇异剖面的分类理论，发现了电场衰减速率对奇异剖面类型的临界影响。
AI.motivation: 研究电流体动力学两相自由边界问题中驻点附近自由界面的奇异行为，探索Stokes猜想在电场存在下的推广，分析电场对界面奇异剖面的影响。
AI.techniques: 变分原理、几何方法、Weiss型单调性公式、频率公式、集中紧致性论证。
AI.main_theorems: 发现电场衰减的临界速率，并据此分类奇异剖面：快于临界衰减时得到Stokes角；等于临界衰减时可能得到Stokes角或非对称角；慢于临界衰减时形成尖点奇异性。
AI.significance: 将Stokes猜想推广到两相电流体动力学问题，建立了电场强度与界面奇异性的定量关系，为理解电场对流体界面稳定性的影响提供了理论基础。

title: Energy decay of a viscoelastic wave equation with variable exponent logarithmic nonlinearity and weak damping
summary: In this paper, we investigate the energy decay of the solution to a viscoelastic wave equation with variable exponents logarithmic nonlinearity and weak damping in a bounded domain. We establish an explicit general decay result under mild conditions on the relaxation function $g$. Furthermore, under the general assumption $g'(t)\leq-ζ(t)G(g(t))$ with some suitably given $ζ$ and $G$, we derive a refined decay estimate improving existing results. In particular, uniform exponential and polynomial decay rates are obtained under a further special situation $g'(t)\leq-ξ(t)g^q(t)$ with $1\leq q<2$, extending earlier studies that were restricted to the case $1\leq q<\frac{3}{2}$.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有变指数对数非线性和弱阻尼的粘弹性波方程能量衰减的显式一般衰减结果，并改进了现有衰减估计
AI.motivation: 研究具有变指数对数非线性和弱阻尼的粘弹性波方程的能量衰减问题，这类方程在材料科学和连续介质力学中具有重要应用，特别是在描述具有记忆效应的粘弹性材料振动行为时
AI.techniques: 使用Lyapunov泛函方法、能量估计技术、凸性引理，以及处理变指数对数非线性的特殊分析技巧，在松弛函数满足一般衰减条件$g'(t)\leq-ζ(t)G(g(t))$下建立衰减估计
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在松弛函数$g$满足温和条件下建立了显式一般衰减结果；2. 在一般假设$g'(t)\leq-ζ(t)G(g(t))$下推导了改进的衰减估计；3. 在特殊情形$g'(t)\leq-ξ(t)g^q(t)$ ($1\leq q<2$)下获得了均匀指数和多项式衰减率，将早期研究的$1\leq q<\frac{3}{2}$范围扩展到$1\leq q<2$
AI.significance: 扩展了粘弹性波方程衰减理论的研究范围，特别是对变指数对数非线性情形提供了更一般的衰减估计框架，为具有复杂非线性结构的波方程稳定性分析提供了新工具，在粘弹性材料振动控制和能量耗散机制研究中具有应用价值

title: Self-Similar Solutions and Global Existence for Nonlinear Reaction-Diffusion Systems in Industrial Ammonia Synthesis
comment: 15 pages, numerical simulations, Keywords: Nonlinear parabolic systems; Reaction-diffusion; Ammonia production; Self-similar reduction; Global solutions; Asymptotic expansions
summary: This paper investigates a system of nonlinear reaction-diffusion equations modeling the industrial synthesis of ammonia. By applying Lie group analysis, we construct self-similar solutions and derive a reduced system of ordinary differential equations. Using comparison principles and barrier techniques, we establish sufficient conditions for the existence of global-in-time solutions in both slow-diffusion ($γ_i > 0$) and fast-diffusion ($γ_i < 0$) regimes. Detailed asymptotic analysis near the diffusion front reveals power-law behavior of concentration profiles, with explicit expressions for the decay exponents. The theoretical results are illustrated by numerical simulations, demonstrating the spatio-temporal evolution of reactant concentrations under realistic parameter values. The study provides rigorous mathematical foundations for predicting and optimizing ammonia production in catalytic reactors, with potential extensions to other chemically reacting systems.

AI.tldr: 应用李群分析和比较原理建立了氨合成反应-扩散系统在慢扩散和快扩散两种机制下的全局解存在性条件
AI.motivation: 研究工业氨合成过程的非线性反应-扩散系统，为催化反应器中氨生产的预测和优化提供严格的数学基础
AI.techniques: 李群分析构造自相似解，比较原理和障碍技术，渐近分析（扩散前沿附近的幂律行为），数值模拟验证
AI.main_theorems: 建立了慢扩散（γ_i > 0）和快扩散（γ_i < 0）两种机制下全局时间解存在的充分条件，推导了浓度分布的显式衰减指数表达式
AI.significance: 为催化反应器中的氨生产提供了严格的数学预测框架，可扩展到其他化学反应系统，具有工业应用价值

title: Liouville type theorems for some $(p,q)$-Laplace equations with gradient dependent reaction on Riemannian manifolds
summary:
In this paper, we combine Bochner formula, Saloff-Coste's Sobolev inequality and the Nash-Moser iteration method to study the local and global behaviors of solutions to the nonlinear elliptic equation $Δ_pu+Δ_qu+h(u,|
abla u|^2)=0$ defined on a complete Riemannian manifold $\left(M,gight)$, where $q\ge p>1$, $h\in C^1(\mathbb{R}	imes\mathbb{R}^{+})$ and $Δ_z u=\mathrm{div}\left(\left|
abla uight|^{z-2}
abla uight)$, with $z\in\{ p,~q\}$, is the usual $z$-Laplace operator. Under some assumptions on $p$, $q$ and $h(x,y)$, we derive concise gradient estimates for solutions to the above equation and then obtain some Liouville type theorems. In particular, we use integral estimate method to show that, if $u$ is a non-negative entire solution to $Δ_p u +Δ_q u=0$ ($n\le p\le q$) on a complete non-compact Riemannian manifold $M$ with non-negative Ricci curvature and $\dim M = n\ge2$, then $u$ is a trivial constant solution.

AI.tldr: 结合Bochner公式、Saloff-Coste Sobolev不等式和Nash-Moser迭代方法，研究Riemann流形上(p,q)-Laplace型非线性椭圆方程的梯度估计和Liouville定理
AI.motivation: 研究完备Riemann流形上(p,q)-Laplace型非线性椭圆方程$Δ_pu+Δ_qu+h(u,|\nabla u|^2)=0$的解的局部和全局行为，其中$q\ge p>1$，旨在建立梯度估计并推导Liouville型定理
AI.techniques: Bochner公式、Saloff-Coste Sobolev不等式、Nash-Moser迭代方法、积分估计方法、比较原理、极大值原理
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在特定条件下推导出解的简洁梯度估计；2. 获得Liouville型定理；3. 特别证明：在Ricci曲率非负的完备非紧Riemann流形上，当$n\le p\le q$时，方程$Δ_p u +Δ_q u=0$的非负整体解必为常数解
AI.significance: 将(p,q)-Laplace算子的研究推广到Riemann流形背景，发展了非线性椭圆方程在几何分析中的理论，为研究流形上的非线性偏微分方程提供了新的工具和结果

title: Qualitative Aspects of Periodic Traveling Waves for the Sinh-Gordon equation
summary: This paper presents a comprehensive analysis of several aspects of the sinh-Gordon equation within a periodic setting. Our investigation proceeds in three main stages. First we establish the existence of periodic solutions for a fixed wave speed and varying periods by applying the mountain pass theorem. Subsequently, for a fixed period, we construct a family of periodic solutions that depend smoothly on the wave speed; this is achieved via the implicit function theorem. The spectral stability of these waves is then rigorously addressed. We perform a detailed spectral analysis of the linearized operator around the wave of fixed period. A key element in this analysis is the monotonicity of the period map, which, when combined with Morse index theory, enables us to fully characterize the non-positive spectrum of the projected operator in the space of zero-mean periodic functions. Finally, by employing the Hamiltonian-Krein index analysis, we determine the spectral stability and instability of the constructed waves. We additionally discuss qualitative aspects of the Cauchy problem associated with the sinh-Gordon equation, including local well-posedness and blow-up phenomena. The former supports a new linearization of the problem, while the latter predicts the spectral instability of the wave.

AI.tldr: 该论文系统研究了周期背景下sinh-Gordon方程解的存在性、光滑依赖性、谱稳定性及Cauchy问题性质
AI.motivation: 研究周期背景下sinh-Gordon方程的数学性质，包括解的存在性、参数依赖性、谱稳定性以及相关的Cauchy问题，填补该方程在周期设定下的理论空白
AI.techniques: 山路定理、隐函数定理、谱分析、周期映射单调性、Morse指标理论、Hamiltonian-Krein指标分析、线性化算子分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 固定波速变周期解的存在性；2) 固定周期下解对波速的光滑依赖性；3) 线性化算子在零均值周期函数空间中的谱特征刻画；4) 波的谱稳定性/不稳定性判定
AI.significance: 为sinh-Gordon方程建立了完整的周期解理论框架，提供了谱稳定性分析的系统方法，对可积系统理论和非线性波方程的数学研究有重要贡献

title: A linear model of separation for western boundary currents with bathymetry
summary: This paper is devoted to the asymptotic analysis of strongly rotating and stratified fluids, under a $β$-plane approximation, and within a three-dimensional spatial domain with strong topography. Our purpose is to propose a linear idealized model, which is able to capture one of the key features of western boundary currents, in spite of its simplicity: the separation of the currents from the coast. Our simplified framework allows us to perform explicit computations, and to highlight the intricate links between rotation, stratification and bathymetry. In fact, we are able to construct approximate solutions at any order for our system, and to justify their validity. Each term in the asymptotic expansion is the sum of an interior part and of two boundary layer parts: a ``Munk'' type boundary layer, which is quasi-geostrophic, and an ``Ekman part'', which is not. Even though the Munk part of the approximation bears some similarity with previously studied 2D models, the analysis of the Ekman part is completely new, and several of its properties differ strongly from the ones of classical Ekman layers. Our theoretical analysis is supplemented with numerical illustrations, which exhibit the desired separation behavior.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个能捕捉西边界流分离现象的线性理想化模型，通过渐近分析揭示了旋转、层结和地形之间的复杂联系。
AI.motivation: 研究强旋转和层结流体在β平面近似下的渐近行为，特别关注三维强地形域中西边界流的分离现象，旨在建立一个能捕捉这一关键特征的简化线性模型。
AI.techniques: 渐近分析、边界层理论、构造任意阶近似解、数值模拟验证；区分了"Munk型"准地转边界层和"Ekman型"非准地转边界层。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了能构造任意阶渐近解的框架，证明了近似解的有效性；揭示了Ekman部分与经典Ekman层的显著不同性质；通过数值模拟展示了西边界流的分离行为。
AI.significance: 首次在三维强地形背景下系统分析了旋转、层结和地形的相互作用，对理解西边界流分离机制有重要理论意义，为海洋环流建模提供了新的分析框架。

title: Global Hilbert expansion for the ionic Vlasov-Poisson-Boltzmann system
summary: We justify the global-in-time validity of Hilbert expansion for the ionic Vlasov-Poisson-Boltzmann system in $\mathbb{R}^3$, a fundamental model describing ion dynamics in dilute collisional plasmas. As the Knudsen number approaches zero, we rigorously derive the compressible Euler-Poisson system governing global smooth irrotational ion flows. The truncated Hilbert expansion exhibits a multi-layered mathematical structure: the expansion coefficients satisfy linear hyperbolic systems, while the remainder equation couples with a nonlinear Poisson equation for the electrostatic potential. This requires refined elliptic estimates addressing the exponential nonlinearities and some new enclosed $L^2\cap W^{1,\infty}$ estimates for the potential-dependent terms.

AI.tldr: 在三维空间中严格证明了离子Vlasov-Poisson-Boltzmann系统的全局Hilbert展开有效性，从动理学方程推导出可压缩Euler-Poisson系统
AI.motivation: 研究稀薄碰撞等离子体中离子动力学的动理学描述，当Knudsen数趋于零时，从微观的Vlasov-Poisson-Boltzmann系统推导出宏观的Euler-Poisson系统，建立动理学方程与流体力学方程之间的严格数学联系
AI.techniques: Hilbert展开方法、多尺度分析、线性双曲系统的处理、非线性Poisson方程的椭圆估计、处理指数非线性的精细估计、势依赖项的新L²∩W^{1,∞}估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了离子Vlasov-Poisson-Boltzmann系统全局Hilbert展开的有效性，严格推导出可压缩Euler-Poisson系统作为Knudsen数趋于零的极限，建立了全局光滑无旋离子流的宏观描述
AI.significance: 为等离子体物理中动理学与流体力学模型之间的过渡提供了严格的数学基础，发展了处理带Poisson耦合的动理学方程的新估计技术，对稀薄等离子体理论有重要理论意义

title: Dissipative solutions to a Beris-Edwards type model for compressible active nematic liquid crystals
summary: We study the hydrodynamics of compressible active nematic liquid crystals in a three-dimensional and bounded domain, with a nonlinear viscosity tensor and nonhomogeneous boundary data, in a Landau-de Gennes framework. We prove the existence of dissipative solutions within a Beris-Edwards type model for active nematodynamics, which are weak solutions satisfying the underlying equations modulo a defect measure. The proof follows from a three level approximation scheme -- the Galerkin approximation, the classical parabolic regularization of the continuity equation, and the convex regularization of the potential generating the viscous stress. New techniques are required to deal with non-Newtonian stress tensor, larger classes of admissible pressure potentials and nonhomogeneous boundary conditions.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维有界域中可压缩活性向列相液晶流体动力学在非线性粘性张量和非齐次边界条件下的耗散解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究可压缩活性向列相液晶在三维有界域中的流体动力学，考虑非线性粘性张量和非齐次边界条件，在Landau-de Gennes理论框架下建立数学模型
AI.techniques: 三层逼近方案：Galerkin逼近、连续性方程的经典抛物正则化、粘性应力生成势的凸正则化；处理非牛顿应力张量、更广泛压力势类别和非齐次边界条件的新技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Beris-Edwards型活性向列动力学模型中耗散解的存在性，这些弱解满足基本方程模一个缺陷测度
AI.significance: 为可压缩活性液晶系统建立了严格的数学理论框架，扩展了非牛顿流体和非齐次边界条件下的分析技术，对软物质物理和生物物理建模有重要意义

title: Optimal Spectral Inequality for the Higher-Dimensional Landau Operator
summary: We prove optimal spectral inequalities for Landau operators in full space and in arbitrary dimension. Spectral inequalities are lower bounds on the L 2 -mass of functions in spectral subspaces of finite energy when integrated over a sampling set S $\subset$ R d . Landau operators are Schr{ö}dinger operators associated with a constant magnetic field of the form (-$\nabla$ + A(x)) 2 where A is a -in case of non-vanishing magnetic field -unbounded vector potential. Our strategy relies on so-called magnetic Bernstein estimates and analyticity, adapting an approach used by Kovrijkine in the context of the Logvinenko-Sereda theorem. We generalize results previously only known in dimension d = 2. The main difficulty in dimension d $\ge$ 3 are the magnetic Bernstein inequalities which, in comparison to the twodimensional case, lead to additional complications and require more delicate estimates. Our results have immediate consequences for control theory, spectral theory and mathematical physics which we comment on.

AI.tldr: 证明了任意维度全空间中Landau算子的最优谱不等式，将二维结果推广到高维情形。
AI.motivation: 研究Landau算子（带恒定磁场的薛定谔算子）的谱不等式，这类不等式描述了有限能量谱子空间函数在采样集上的L²质量下界，在控制理论、谱理论和数学物理中有重要应用。
AI.techniques: 采用磁Bernstein估计和解析性方法，借鉴Kovrijkine在Logvinenko-Sereda定理中的思路，处理高维情形下磁Bernstein不等式带来的额外复杂性。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了任意维度全空间中Landau算子的最优谱不等式，克服了高维情况下磁Bernstein不等式带来的技术困难，将先前仅适用于二维的结果推广到任意维度。
AI.significance: 为控制理论、谱理论和数学物理提供了重要工具，特别是在量子力学中带磁场系统的可观测性、控制性和谱分析方面有直接应用。

title: Long time dynamics of the Nernst-Planck-Darcy System on $\mathbb{R}^3$
summary: We study ionic electrodiffusion modeled by the Nernst--Planck equations describing the evolution of $N$ ionic species in a three-dimensional incompressible fluid flowing through a porous medium. We address the long-time dynamics of the resulting system in the three-dimensional whole space $\mathbb{R}^3$. We prove that the $k$-th spatial derivatives of each ionic concentration decays to zero in $L^2$ with a sharp rate of order $t^{-\frac{3}{4}-\frac{k}{2}}$. Moreover, we investigate the behavior of the relative entropy associated with the model and show that it blows up in time with a sharp growth rate of order $\log t$.

AI.tldr: 研究了Nernst-Planck方程描述的多离子物种在三维多孔介质流体中的长时间动力学，获得了浓度空间导数的衰减速率和相对熵的增长速率
AI.motivation: 研究Nernst-Planck方程描述的多离子物种在三维多孔介质不可压缩流体中的长时间动力学行为，这是电扩散现象的重要数学模型
AI.techniques: 使用能量方法、熵分析、衰减估计和L^2范数估计等PDE分析技术，研究长时间渐近行为
AI.main_theorems: 1) 离子浓度k阶空间导数在L^2范数下以速率t^{-3/4-k/2}衰减到零；2) 相对熵以log t的速率随时间增长
AI.significance: 为电扩散系统的长时间行为提供了精确的衰减和增长速率估计，对理解多孔介质中离子输运的渐近性质有重要理论意义

title: Semi-Classical Localization of the Schrödinger Resolvent on Closed Riemann Surfaces
summary: This paper investigates the localization properties of solutions to the semi-classical Schrödinger equation on closed Riemann surfaces. Unlike classical studies that assume a smooth potential, our work addresses the challenges arising from irregular potentials, specifically those that are merely bounded. We employ a regularization technique to manage the potential's lack of smoothness and establish a local-to-global estimate. This result provides a quantitative measure of how the local regularity of the potential influences the global concentration of the solution, thereby bridging the gap between smooth and non-continuous regimes in semi-classical analysis.

AI.tldr: 建立了闭黎曼曲面上半经典薛定谔方程解在非光滑有界势能下的局部化性质估计
AI.motivation: 研究闭黎曼曲面上半经典薛定谔方程解的局部化性质，传统研究假设势能光滑，本文处理非光滑（仅是有界）势能带来的挑战
AI.techniques: 采用正则化技术处理势能非光滑性，建立局部到全局的估计方法
AI.main_theorems: 建立了势能局部正则性对解全局集中性的定量影响估计，填补了半经典分析中光滑与非连续势能之间的理论空白
AI.significance: 扩展了半经典分析中势能正则性要求，为处理非光滑势能提供了理论框架，在量子力学和几何分析中有潜在应用

title: Another look at regularity in transport-commutator estimates
comment: 42 pages. This article is dedicated to the memory of Haïm Brezis whose life and work were a great source of inspiration
summary: We are interested in how regular a transport velocity field must be in order to control Riesz-type commutators. Estimates for these commutators play a central role in the analysis of the mean-field limit and fluctuations for systems of particles with pairwise Riesz interactions, which we start by reviewing. Our first new result shows that the usual $L^\infty$ assumption on the gradient of the velocity field cannot, in general, be relaxed to a BMO assumption. We construct counterexamples in all dimensions and all Riesz singularities $-2< s<d$, except for the one-dimensional logarithmic endpoint $s=0$. At this exceptional endpoint, such a relaxation is possible, a fact related to the classical Coifman-Rochberg-Weiss commutator bound for the Hilbert transform. Our second result identifies a trade-off between the singularity of the interaction potential and the required regularity of the velocity field. Roughly speaking, smoother (less singular) interactions require stronger velocity control if one wants a commutator estimate in the natural energy seminorm determined by the potential. We formulate this principle for a broad class of potentials and show that, in the sub-Coulomb Riesz regime, the velocity regularity appearing in the known commutator inequality is sharp. Despite these negative findings, we show as our third result that a defective commutator estimate holds for almost-Lipschitz transport fields. Such a defective estimate, which is a consequence of the celebrated Brezis-Wainger-Hansson inequality, allows us to prove rates of convergence when the mean-field density belongs to the scaling-critical Sobolev space.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了Riesz型交换子对速度场正则性的依赖关系，揭示了L∞假设的不可松弛性、势能奇异性与速度正则性之间的权衡关系，并建立了缺陷交换子估计。
AI.motivation: 研究背景源于具有成对Riesz相互作用的粒子系统的平均场极限和涨落分析，其中交换子估计起着核心作用。核心问题是探究控制Riesz型交换子所需的速度场正则性条件。
AI.techniques: 使用反例构造法、BMO空间分析、Coifman-Rochberg-Weiss交换子界、Brezis-Wainger-Hansson不等式、能量半范方法以及尺度临界Sobolev空间理论。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 证明速度场梯度的L∞假设一般不能松弛为BMO假设；2) 揭示势能奇异性与速度正则性之间的权衡关系；3) 对几乎Lipschitz速度场建立缺陷交换子估计，并应用于平均场密度在尺度临界Sobolev空间中的收敛速率。
AI.significance: 该研究深化了对Riesz交换子正则性要求的理解，为粒子系统平均场极限分析提供了精确的正则性条件，对奇异积分算子理论和统计力学中的多体问题有重要理论意义。
